{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/187-слой-представительских-агентов-md.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. СЛОЙ ПРЕДСТАВИТЕЛЬСКИХ АГЕНТОВ.md


{quote}- [166-representative-agent-layer-md|166-representative-agent-layer-md.md] (сходство 0.33){quote}

----





h2. СЛОЙ ПРЕДСТАВИТЕЛЬСКИХ АГЕНТОВ.md
markdown
{code:language=markdown}
# Слой Представительских Агентов

<!-- similar-docs -->

---

**Похожие документы:**
- [166-representative-agent-layer-md](166-representative-agent-layer-md.md) (сходство 0.33)
- [134-the-double-triangle-architecture-md](134-the-double-triangle-architecture-md.md) (сходство 0.25)
- [305-a-practical-path-to-layer-b-through-symbiotic-inte](305-a-practical-path-to-layer-b-through-symbiotic-inte.md) (сходство 0.17)

<!-- backlinks-auto -->
## Упоминается в

- [1. Why Single-Triangle Models Are Incomplete](138-1-why-single-triangle-models-are-incomplete.md)
- [5. Architectural Specification](174-5-architectural-specification.md)
- [A Practical Path to Layer B Through Symbiotic Integration](305-a-practical-path-to-layer-b-through-symbiotic-inte.md)
- [Abstract](168-abstract.md)
- [Planned (v0.2.0)](132-planned-v0-2-0.md)
- [REPRESENTATIVE AGENT LAYER.md](166-representative-agent-layer-md.md)
- [THE DOUBLE-TRIANGLE ARCHITECTURE.md](134-the-double-triangle-architecture-md.md)
- [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам](README.md)
## Упоминается в

- [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам](../README.md)

<!-- related-auto -->
## Связанные документы

- [A Practical Path to Layer B Through Symbiotic Integration](305-a-practical-path-to-layer-b-through-symbiotic-inte.md) _81%_
- [REPRESENTATIVE AGENT LAYER.md](166-representative-agent-layer-md.md) _73%_
- [THE DOUBLE-TRIANGLE ARCHITECTURE.md](134-the-double-triangle-architecture-md.md) _53%_

- [Angle / Perspective](13-angle-perspective.md) _21%_
- [Abstract](168-abstract.md) _21%_
- [Content Overview](12-content-overview.md) _17%_
## Связанные документы

- [REPRESENTATIVE AGENT LAYER.md](166-representative-agent-layer-md.md) _81%_
- [A Practical Path to Layer B Through Symbiotic Integration](305-a-practical-path-to-layer-b-through-symbiotic-inte.md) _66%_
